title: Аbisu nohi no akuma Sword
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword.
body:
For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

Rename your sword to "Аbisu nohi no akuma" to make it a katana. If you take the katana in your second hand, it will be sheathed.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c10459f6d1cb74bf4f497a24b0ccf0288fa1b20.png)
